final:
module top_module(
    input wire [2:0] vec,
    output wire [2:0] outv,
    output wire o2,
    output wire o1,
    output wire o0
);assign {o2, o1, o0} = vec;
assign outv = vec;

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      outv <= ~vec; o2 <= ~vec[0]; o1 <= ~vec[1]; o0 <= ~vec[2];
    end
  end

endmodule
